items.title: Cover your grass trimming and yard clearing needs with this 2-in-1 EGO Power+ combo down at $349
items.summary:
Amazon is offering the EGO Power+ 56V Cordless Electric 15-inch POWERLOAD String Trimmer and 670 CFM Leaf Blower Combo with a 4.0Ah battery for $349 shipped right now, bringing down the cost from its full $410 price tag. It stayed at that full price until April and then spent two months down at $350 before rising back up by the end of May. Now, not much longer after that price spike, a $61 markdown has come along to drop it $1 lower than our previous mention for the best price we have tracked in 2026. You’ll also find a bunch more of EGO’s tool deals in the official Amazon storefront here.
